label: safe
description: Payment API documentation - mentions transactions but is legitimate developer docs
content:
Payment Gateway API Reference

Initiating a Payment

To initiate a payment, send a POST request to /api/v1/payments with the following parameters:

{
  "amount": 1000,
  "currency": "USD",
  "source": "tok_visa",
  "description": "Order #12345"
}

Security Requirements

All API requests must include your secret API key in the Authorization header. Never expose your secret key in client-side code.

Testing

Use test mode API keys to simulate payments without moving real money. Test card number: 4242424242424242
